data.title: Grant of share-based long-term incentive instruments to members of the Board of Management and key employees
data.description: ALK (ALKB:DC / Nasdaq Copenhagen: ALK B) recently approved the granting of 145,000 share-based instruments as part of their long-term incentive plan (LTIP) for the Board of Management and key employees in 2026. This decision is in accordance with the company's remuneration policy set during the Annual General Meeting on 16 March 2026.

data.title: Will S&P 500 Open Up Or Down Today? Here's How Traders Lean After Best Rally Since May On Iran Peace Hopes
data.description: On Tuesday, the S&P 500 experienced a significant surge, with a 2.91% increase, closing at 6,528.52. This marked the index's best single-day performance since May. The optimistic outlook was fueled by hopes for a resolution to the Iran conflict. The Polymarket, based on Polygon (CRYPTO: POL), indicates a bullish sentiment among traders for Wednesday's market. In the April 1 market, 79% of traders have placed bets on the market going "Up." Initial trading activity is focused on predicting whether the S&P 500 will open higher or lower, with odds initially exceeding 80%. The recent rally was primarily driven by increasing optimism surrounding the potential de-escalation of the conflict. President Donald Trump's statement about the possible withdrawal of U.S. forces contributed to this positive momentum.
